div.p: Buffer Pool Frame Lifecycle — Pin/Unpin/Dirty/Eviction Transitions
EMPTY page_id = INVALID pin_count = 0 is_dirty = false On free stack or just evicted
CLEAN_PINNED page_id = valid pin_count > 0 is_dirty = false ❌ NOT evictable
DIRTY_PINNED page_id = valid pin_count > 0 is_dirty = true ❌ NOT evictable ⚠ Journal hook fired on first dirty transition
CLEAN_UNPINNED page_id = valid pin_count = 0 is_dirty = false ✅ Evictable (no write) In LRU list
DIRTY_UNPINNED page_id = valid pin_count = 0 is_dirty = true ✅ Evictable (MUST write) In LRU list
ILLEGAL Transitions (Invariant Violations)
journal_write → journal_fsync → database_write → database_fsync → journal_delete
Eviction of a dirty frame triggers:
fetch_page() [cache miss] pread(db_fd) or wal_read_page() pin_count = 1 Move to LRU head
fetch_page() [cache hit] pin_count++ Move to LRU head
unpin_page(dirty=true) or mark_dirty() is_dirty = true pin_count unchanged (mark) or pin_count-- (unpin) 🔒 txn_journal_page() fires (reads ORIGINAL from db file)
fetch_page() [hit] pin_count++ —or— unpin(dirty=true) pin_count-- (still > 0) Journal: no-op (already journaled)
unpin_page(dirty=false) pin_count-- → 0 Remains in LRU list
unpin_page(dirty=false) pin_count-- → 0 is_dirty remains true Remains in LRU list
fetch_page() [cache hit] pin_count = 1 Move to LRU head
fetch_page() [cache hit] pin_count = 1 Move to LRU head
mark_dirty() is_dirty = true 🔒 txn_journal_page() fires
evict_frame() get_free_frame() selected this frame from LRU tail Remove from page_table Remove from LRU list page_id = INVALID No disk write (clean)
evict_frame() 🔒 fsync(journal_fd) first! (write-ordering invariant)
pwrite(db_fd, page_data) is_dirty = false Remove from page_table Remove from LRU list page_id = INVALID stat_evictions++ stat_disk_writes++
flush_page() or flush_all() pwrite(db_fd, page_data) fsync(db_fd) is_dirty = false Frame stays in pool
